title: Lifecycle
description: Task/agent state-machine node — A2A-aligned task states (agency/lifecycle.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — workflow-spine coverage). Linked SERVES→Intent; gates record PASSED/BLOCKED_ON edges; agents link via DISPATCHED_TO.

state.description: A2A-aligned task state. Starts 'working' on open(); advances through gates; 'input-required' when a gate blocks.

phase.description: Phase counter — incremented by lifecycle.move() when a gate passes. Starts at 0.
